info.name: AxiomNizam CDC & ETL Platform
info.description: Full CDC (Change Data Capture) and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipeline management, observability, and connector endpoints.

request.description: Get all ETL pipelines with their current status, steps, and run counts.
Get a specific ETL pipeline by ID.
Create a new ETL pipeline with steps and schedule.
Update an existing ETL pipeline.
Delete an ETL pipeline by ID.
Trigger a manual run of an ETL pipeline.
Get all ETL pipeline run history.
Get runs filtered by pipeline ID.
Get details of a specific run including step results and metrics.
Get ETL observability metrics: total runs, success/failure counts, rows processed, avg duration, step type stats, error breakdown, and throughput log.
List all available ETL connectors (databases, files, APIs, queues, streams).
Get all CDC pipelines with source/sink configs, event counts, lag, and status.
Get a specific CDC pipeline by ID.
Create a new CDC pipeline with source connector, sink connector, and filters.
Update an existing CDC pipeline.
Delete a CDC pipeline.
Start a CDC pipeline (begin capturing changes).
Pause a running CDC pipeline.
Stop a CDC pipeline completely.
Get CDC observability metrics: pipeline counts, events total, events/sec, errors, lag, events by operation, events by table, error breakdown, and throughput log.
List all available CDC source connector types (MySQL binlog, PG WAL, MongoDB oplog, polling, webhook, etc.).
List all available CDC sink connector types (Kafka, webhook, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, S3, Redis, API).
Get combined overview of the entire data platform: ETL and CDC observability, connector counts, and all pipelines.
